name: cc-dev-tools
description: Claude Code marketplace containing development tools and AI integrations for advanced workflows

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Invoke Codex CLI for complex coding tasks requiring high reasoning capabilities. Triggers: 'use codex', 'ask codex', 'run codex', 'codex cli', 'GPT-5 reasoning', 'OpenAI reasoning'. Supports intelligent model selection, session continuation, and safe defaults.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Google Gemini CLI integration for Claude Code. Provides access to Gemini AI models with intelligent model selection, session continuation, and safe defaults.

plugins.name: nanobanana
plugins.description: Standalone image generation using Nano Banana MCP server. Generates and edits images, icons, diagrams, patterns, and visual assets via Gemini image models. No Gemini CLI required.

plugins.name: telegram-notifier
plugins.description: Telegram bridge for Claude Code: notification hooks plus on-demand artifact sending via the telegram skill. Triggers: 'use asun:telegram to send', 'telegram this file'. Supports images, video, audio, documents, voice notes, animations, stickers, and text. Configurable via environment variables with dry-run mode.
